nodes.name: 热带雨林
nodes.summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Yellow-spotted honeyeater
nodes.summary: Yellow-spotted honeyeater（Yellow-spotted honeyeater，学名 Meliphaga notata），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括热带雨林。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The bird largely lives in the tropical rainforests of North Queensland in extreme northeastern Australia, between Mackay and northern Cape York Peninsula. In 1901, it was also said to inhabit New Guinea. Yellow-spotted honeyeaters typically live at elevations of or greater. They have been observed at elevations as high as above sea level, although they are not often observed above . While the birds typically live in forests, they have been known to visit suburbs with sufficient tree cover. They have even been observed in some cities that use local plants for landscaping
